bonuses.text: 2x Chance to receive Candy XL from catching Pokémon
One additional Special Trade can be made for a maximum of two for the day*
Trades made will require 50% less Stardust*

bonusDisclaimers: * While most bonuses are only active during the three hours of the event (2:00 p.m. to 5:00 p.m. local time), these bonuses will be active from 2:00 p.m. to 9:00 p.m. local time.
The three-hour Incense bonus excludes Daily Adventure Incense and the one-hour Lure bonus excludes Golden Lure Modules.

name: Great League and Summer Cup: Great League Edition | Forever Forward
heading: GO Battle League

bonuses.description: The following bonuses are active from 10:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m. local time on both event days.

items.text: Lure Modules activated during the event will last for one hour
Incense (excluding Daily Adventure Incense) will attract special Pokémon
Party Play will be active for nine hours
Increased chance of encountering Shiny Pokémon
Special Research including an encounter with Zeraora
Branching Timed Research with a choice between Mega Mewtwo X or Mega Mewtwo Y
Global Challenges to unlock additional bonuses and Ultra Unlock events
Different Pokémon type-themed Field Research every hour

bonuses.description: The following bonuses are active from 12:00 a.m. to 11:59 p.m. local time on both event days.

items.text: Up to nine free Raid Passes per day by spinning Photo Discs at Gyms
Up to six Special Trades each day
Open up to 50 Gifts each day

heading: GO Battle League

season.note: Continuing in Forever Forward, different days of the week will include a Daily Discovery experience. These will be active between 12:00 a.m. and 11:59 p.m. local time unless otherwise stated. Starting Monday, June 15, these are the updated bonuses for Forever Forward. Daily Discoveries may change as we experiment with how to make the best experience. Please note: Daily Discoveries will not be available during the week of global GO Fest, GO Wild Area, and GO Tour events.

bonuses.title: Scenic Sunday
items: More Pokémon will appear in the wild! [NEW]
More Pokémon will appear while following a Route. Incense will attract even more Pokémon on Routes.
Reduced distance to earn Buddy Candy while exploring Routes with your Buddy Pokémon.
Encounter Mateo up to three times each day while on a Route.

bonuses.title: Max Monday
items: One guaranteed Rare Candy XL for winning in-person Max Battles [New]
Power Spots will refresh more frequently.
Additional Power Spots will be active on Mondays compared to the rest of the week.
Max Battles will rotate to feature different Dynamax Pokémon.

dailyBonuses.footnote: Max Battles will be available between 6:00 a.m. and 9:00 p.m. local time. Power Spot availability will be limited outside of Max Mondays and Max Battle Days.

bonuses.title: Showcase Tuesday
items: Trainers can enter up to five PokéStop Showcases.
More PokéStops may have PokéStop Showcases.

bonuses.title: Raid Hour
items: One Rare Candy XL for completing in-person Raid Battles. [NEW]
Raid Bosses for five-star raids and Mega Raids will rotate at the start of the day each week.
Raid Hours will continue to feature the five-star Raid Boss between 6:00 p.m. and 7:00 p.m. local time.

bonuses.title: GO Battle Thursdays and Spotlight Hour
items: Spotlight Hour will return from 6:00 p.m. to 7:00 p.m. local time. [NEW]

bonuses.title: Friendship Friday
items: Up to two additional Special Trades.
Increased chance of Lucky Trade for any trade.
Two guaranteed Candy XL from trades (Trainers level 31+).

dailyBonuses.footnote: These bonuses only apply to in-person trades.

seasonBonuses.text: One additional Candy for trading Pokémon
Increased limits on opening, receiving from PokéStop and Gym Photo Discs, and storing Gifts
Increased XP and Stardust from hatching Eggs

name: Great League, Ultra League, and Master League: Mega Edition | Forever Forward
